case_title: TSIGLIERIS, FOTIOS I. VS AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS ARMY MISSION VALENCIA INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY TSIGLIERIS, FOTIOS I. AS TO DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS ARMY MISSION VALENCIA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEF.CLAY C/O AAMCO TRASM. RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSIGLIERIS, FOTIOS I. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AAMCO TRANSMISSIONS ARMY MISSION VALENCIA INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
